prompt_text: Semgrep vs SonarQube pricing and features
response:
# Semgrep vs SonarQube: Pricing & Features Comparison

## Pricing Models

### Semgrep
| Plan | Cost | Best For |
|------|------|----------|
| **Pro** | Free | Individual developers, open source |
| **Team** | $120/month | Small teams (up to 5 users) |
| **Enterprise** | Custom | Large organizations |

- **No per-seat charges** for Pro/Team
- Self-hosted option available
- Git-based billing (scanned repos)

### SonarQube
| Plan | Cost | Best For |
|------|------|----------|
| **Community** | Free | Open source projects |
| **Developer** | $150/year/user | Individual/small teams |
| **Enterprise** | Custom | Large orgs with compliance needs |

- **Per-developer pricing** (most expensive aspect)
- Self-hosted or cloud (SonarCloud)
- 5-user minimum for paid plans

---

## Feature Comparison

### Code Analysis

| Feature | Semgrep | SonarQube |
|---------|---------|----------|
| **Language Support** | 30+ languages | 27 languages |
| **SAST Capabilities** | Strong | Enterprise-grade |
| **Configuration as Code** | YAML rules | Web UI focused |
| **Custom Rules** | Easy (Python-based) | Complex (Java plugins) |
| **Speed** | Very fast (<1 sec) | Slower (minutes for large codebases) |

### Security & Quality

| Feature | Semgrep | SonarQube |
|---------|---------|----------|
| **Secret Detection** | ✅ Native | ⚠️ Limited |
| **Vulnerability DB** | Real-time updates | Regular updates |
| **OWASP Coverage** | ✅ Excellent | ✅ Excellent |
| **License Compliance** | ❌ Limited | ✅ Strong |
| **Technical Debt** | Basic metrics | Comprehensive |

### Integration & DevOps

| Feature | Semgrep | SonarQube |
|---------|---------|----------|
| **CI/CD Integration** | Native (GitHub, GitLab, etc.) | Broad support |
| **PR Comments** | ✅ Native | ✅ Via plugins |
| **IDE Plugins** | VS Code, JetBrains | VS Code, JetBrains, Visual Studio |
| **Deployment Ease** | Docker, cloud-native | Java-based (heavier) |
| **API Quality** | ✅ REST API | ✅ REST API |

---

## When to Choose Each

### **Choose Semgrep if you need:**
- 🚀 **Speed** - Real-time feedback in development
- 💰 **Cost efficiency** - Growing team without per-seat fees
- 🔧 **Ease of use** - Simple rule writing, quick setup
- 🔐 **Secret scanning** - Built-in detection
- 🎯 **Supply chain security** - Dependency analysis

### **Choose SonarQube if you need:**
- 📊 **Code quality metrics** - Comprehensive technical debt tracking
- 🏛️ **Enterprise features** - Audit trails, governance
- 📜 **License management** - Compliance reporting
- 🔐 **Mature ecosystem** - Established integrations
- 👥 **Multi-team management** - Large organization support

---

## Cost Example: 20-Person Team

| Tool | Annual Cost |
|------|------------|
| **Semgrep Team** | $1,440 |
| **SonarQube Dev** | $3,000 |
| **SonarQube Enterprise** | $10,000+ |

---

## Verdict

- **Best for startups/agile teams:** Semgrep (faster, cheaper, simpler)
- **Best for enterprises:** SonarQube (maturity, compliance, breadth)
- **Best hybrid approach:** Use both (Semgrep in IDE, SonarQube for gate reviews)

Would you like a deeper dive into any specific feature or integration?
